nodes.label: Order.OrderStatus Enum
nodes.rationale: Status transitions enforced as PENDING→CONFIRMED→SHIPPED→DELIVERED; PENDING→CANCELLED (customer only). State machine guards against invalid jumps via validateStatusTransition().

nodes.label: Price Snapshot at Order Time
nodes.rationale: OrderItem stores price at time of order as a snapshot so historical orders remain accurate even if product price changes later.

edges.source_location: line 15 - strategyType field maps to strategy pattern
line 133 - publishes event consumed by StockEventListener
ComponentDecorator is the concrete JPA entity; DecoratorComponent is the interface for the Decorator pattern — ComponentDecorator does not explicitly implement DecoratorComponent yet (planned)
lines 59-60 (version counter for ISR cache busting in Next.js frontend)
line 7 (entity wildcard import, entity usage throughout)
lines 466-491 (Redis cache-aside pattern: getFromCache, putInCache, evictCache)
lines 176-182 (write-behind pattern: cache update then async DB persist via writeBehindService.persistThemeUpdate)
lines 23-24 (Javadoc: 'This must be a separate Spring bean from StorefrontCustomizationService')
lines 11-27 (storeId field in CategoryResponse and ProductResponse implies link to Store)
lines 8-27 (SettingsResponse mirrors StoreSettings fields: currency, timezone, language, taxSettings, shippingSettings)
